productDisplayName: Highlander Men Blue Checked Hadley Slim Fit Shirt
description: CompositionBlue and white plaid check full sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, has red and light grey accents, tape and panel detailing on the inseam of the collar and cuffs, patch pocket on the left chest with button detailing, full length buttoned placket with slogan tab towards the hem, sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a curved hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this blue and white plaid check shirt from highlander. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. The sleeves can be rolled up to give a different look. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-17.5 "
